'''Wilk''' was a [[Radnoran]] who was believed to be immune to [[Radnor/Legends|Radnor's]] bioplague, as he was seen in the [[Isolation Sector]] without a protective bio-isolation suit looking for his [[Wilk's wife|wife]]. Later on, it turned out that he was not immune. He had entered the Sector after the plague's half-life made it benign, making him perfectly safe from any harmful effects.

{{Char-stub}}
